name: FIM Defacement Containment
description: Triggered by Wazuh FIM rules 550 and 554. Creates TheHive alert and sends Slack notification when a monitored file is modified.

nodes.name: Extract Alert Fields
nodes.description: Parse agent name, file path, rule ID, timestamp from alert

nodes.name: Create TheHive Alert
nodes.description: Create case in TheHive with file modification details

body.title: FIM Alert: File modified on ${agent_name}

nodes.name: Slack Notification
nodes.description: Alert SOC analyst via Slack webhook
